# 🚀 Sushruto Tailwind

A lightweight utility-first CSS engine built using JavaScript.

## ✨ Features

- ⚡ No CSS required
- 🎯 Utility-first class system
- 🧠 Dynamic class parsing
- 🎨 Glass UI + modern styling
- 🚀 Built from scratch

---

## 🛠️ How It Works

DOM → Extract Classes → Generate CSS → Apply Styles

---

## 📌 Example

```html
<div class="chai-p-20 chai-bg-red chai-text-center">
  Hello World
</div>
